chunks.title: Assembly and Preparation
chunks.reason: Moses gathers the congregation and announces God's command to consecrate Aaron.

chunks.title: Clothing the Priests
chunks.reason: Moses washes and clothes Aaron and his sons with priestly garments.

chunks.title: Sin Offering Ritual
chunks.reason: The bull is sacrificed for the sin offering and burned outside the camp.

chunks.title: Burnt Offering Ritual
chunks.reason: The first ram is sacrificed as a burnt offering for atonement.

chunks.title: Ram of Ordination
chunks.reason: The second ram is sacrificed with blood applied to priests and offerings waved.

chunks.title: Final Anointing
chunks.reason: Oil and blood are sprinkled to consecrate the priests and their garments.

chunks.title: Instructions for Seven Days
chunks.reason: Moses instructs the priests on eating the remainder and staying at the tent.
